ast.source: Archive completed items older than this many days.
ast.target: 归档超过此天数的已完成项目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 归档文件的前缀。默认值：\"Archive_\"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically append today's date when a card is ticked [x] with no existing date.
ast.target: 当卡片被标记为 [x] 且没有现有日期时，自动附加今天的日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of column names treated as Done. Default: "Done"
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的列名列表，视为“已完成”。默认值：\"Done\"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the undated card migration prompt again.
ast.target: 再次显示未标记日期的卡片迁移提示。

ast.target: 天数阈值

ast.target: 归档文件前缀

ast.target: 已完成

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Skipped. Undated cards will appear in 'Undated (review)' when you next run the archive command.
ast.target: 已跳过。未标记日期的卡片将在您下次运行归档命令时出现在“未标记日期（待审阅）”中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有活动文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有要归档的项目。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No items to archive across all boards.
ast.target: 所有看板中都没有要归档的项目。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Archive completed items older than threshold
ast.target: 归档超过阈值的已完成项目

ast.name: name
ast.source: Archive completed items in all Kanban boards
ast.target: 归档所有看板中的已完成项目

ast.name: text
ast.target: 看板归档器 — 首次运行

ast.name: text
ast.source: Without a date, these cards cannot be automatically archived by age. You have two options:
ast.target: 没有日期，这些卡片无法按时间自动归档。您有两个选项：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Stamp today's date on all undated completed cards — they will then be archived after your threshold (default 30 days).
ast.target: 在所有未标记日期的已完成卡片上盖上今天的日期 — 它们将在超过您的阈值（默认为 30 天）后被归档。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Skip — undated cards will be archived immediately the next time you run the archive command, into a separate 'Undated (review)' section.
ast.target: 跳过 — 未标记日期的卡片将在您下次运行归档命令时立即被归档到单独的“未标记日期（待审阅）”部分。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Going forward, completing any card will automatically stamp today's date so this won't happen again.
ast.target: 今后，完成任何卡片都会自动盖上今天的日期，这样就不会再发生这种情况了。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Stamp today's date on all undated cards
ast.target: 在所有未标记日期的卡片上盖上今天的日期

ast.name: text
ast.target: 暂时跳过

ast.name: text
ast.target: 看板归档器设置

ast.name: text
ast.target: 归档位置
